pageContent:
heading "$ask Compliance Snapshot" [e1] [level=1]
paragraph "partially compliant. Python is still too flat and needs package reorganization." [e2]
  generic "Verdict:" [e3]
list [e4]
  listitem "ask_oracle.py is 1214 lines, above the 800-line best-practice limit." [e5]
  listitem "Several modules lack module docstrings." [e6]
  listitem "Most runtime Python modules live flat in the skill root." [e7]
  listitem "run.sh uses uv run --project." [e8]
  listitem "Third-party deps are represented in pyproject.toml." [e9]
  listitem "No direct ArangoDB import, requests, click, or argparse found." [e10]
heading "Python files" [e11] [level=2]
